title: xanthophyllum chartaceum
intro: Xanthophyllum chartaceum, also known as the velvetwood or chartaceous xanthophyllum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polygalaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Xanthophyllum chartaceum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, including infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which are often used to treat skin conditions and wounds.
